text: An inert gas system is required to be fitted:

options.text: On all tankers of above 20,000 tonnes deadweight
On product tankers of above 20,000 tonnes deadweight
On crude oil tankers of above 20,000 tonnes deadweight
On chemical tankers of above 20,000 tonnes deadweight

explanation: Inert Gas Systems (IGS) are mandatory for crude oil tankers of 20,000 tonnes deadweight and above to ensure that cargo tank atmospheres remain non-flammable throughout the voyage and cargo operations.
